research_question: Does vancomycin improve survival compared with alternative therapy in serious Gram-positive infections?
design_summary: Narrative review with systematic search; or single-center cohort if own data — replace with your actual design.
reporting_checklist: PRISMA if systematic review; STROBE if observational; CONSORT if RCT
analysis_plan_summary: Primary: survival at day 28 or hospital discharge per protocol; sensitivity analyses pre-specified in protocol.
writing_outline: IMRaD or chapter: Introduction, Methods, Results, Discussion

milestones.title: Finalize search strategy + register protocol (if SR)
Primary analysis or synthesis + diagnostic checks
